title: Relic Trader
description:
You turn a corner and suddenly, a shadowy figure is just standing there. He pivots to face you.

"Welcome! What're ya trading?"
The figure inquires as he flares open his cloak to reveal a slew of [sine][purple]suspicious wares[/purple][/sine].
conditions: All players must have at least 5 tradable relics
notes: This event offers up to three relic trades, depending on how many tradable relics you currently have. The event displays one trade option for each tradable relic (up to 3 total). The relics offered for trade are randomly selected from your collection, while the replacement relics come from the standard relic pool. If you somehow have no tradable relics when the event appears, a generic [gold]Proceed[/gold] option is shown to skip the event.
